steps.title: Define the needed support
steps.content: The concern was that free virtual tours would make in-person visits seem unnecessary. To support the administrators' claim, the survey finding should show that the tours did not discourage in-person attendance. The strongest support would connect virtual tours to people choosing to visit the museum in person.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant survey findings
steps.content: Choice A only says where visitors lived. Choice C concerns using virtual tours after an in-person visit, not whether tours discouraged visits beforehand. Choice D says many visitors were unaware of the tours, which does not show that the tours helped attendance. The answer is B.
